thesis: Eyewear category leader with the strongest rising-revision profile in my universe; analysts upgrading earnings as the listing matures.
falsification: Revisions roll over or the stock underperforms NIFTY 500 over the next quarter while estimates are cut.

thesis: Textile/garment exporter with strong analyst-revision momentum; benefits from supply-chain shift and margin recovery.
falsification: Revisions fade or export demand weakens, with the name lagging the benchmark over a quarter.

thesis: Mid-cap IT with strong revision momentum and a healthy deal pipeline, bucking the broader IT estimate-cut trend.
falsification: IT discretionary spend deteriorates and revisions turn down; underperforms its IT peers.

thesis: City Union Bank — small-cap lender with rising revisions and improving asset quality at undemanding valuation.
falsification: Revisions stall or slippages rise; the stock lags bank peers over a quarter.

thesis: Hexaware — IT name with strong analyst-revision momentum and resilient growth.
falsification: Revisions roll over with sector-wide IT estimate cuts; underperforms.

thesis: Diversified forgings franchise with rising revisions across auto, defence and exports.
falsification: Revisions fade or auto/defence order momentum stalls; lags the benchmark.

thesis: Granules — vertically integrated pharma with rising revisions and improving US traction.
falsification: Pricing pressure resumes, revisions decline, and the name lags pharma peers.

thesis: Retail broking/fintech platform riding the structural rise in domestic equity participation, with rising estimates.
falsification: Market-volume slowdown or regulatory tightening cuts revisions; underperforms.

thesis: Varun Beverages — PepsiCo bottler with rising revisions on volume and geographic expansion.
falsification: Volume growth disappoints and revisions turn down; lags consumer staples.

thesis: Radico Khaitan — premiumisation-led margin expansion with rising analyst estimates.
falsification: Premium-mix stalls, input costs spike, revisions weaken; underperforms.

thesis: Home First — high-growth affordable housing finance with rising estimates and contained credit cost.
falsification: Asset-quality deterioration or spread compression cuts revisions; lags financials.

thesis: Cholamandalam holding company — exposure to a high-quality lender, rising revisions and modest cheapness.
falsification: Holdco discount widens or the underlying NBFC revisions turn down.

thesis: Prestige Estates — strong pre-sales and rising revisions in a residential up-cycle.
falsification: Pre-sales momentum slows or rates bite; revisions decline and the name lags realty peers.

thesis: Tech Mahindra — margin-recovery turnaround with improving revisions off a low base.
falsification: Margin program stalls and revisions fade; underperforms large-cap IT.

thesis: Jupiter Life Line — regional hospital operator with rising estimates on bed-expansion and occupancy.
falsification: Occupancy or ARPOB disappoints; revisions roll over.

thesis: ONGC — large-cap upstream energy with strong analyst-revision momentum and modest value support; adds liquid large-cap ballast.
falsification: Crude weakens or revisions reverse; the name lags the energy sector and benchmark over a quarter.

thesis: LIC — dominant life insurer with strong analyst-revision momentum and slight value; cheap, liquid, under-owned large-cap.
falsification: VNB growth disappoints, revisions reverse, and the stock lags insurers.

thesis: Muthoot Finance — gold-loan leader benefiting from elevated gold prices and AUM growth, with rising estimates.
falsification: Gold price or regulatory shift cuts AUM/yields and revisions; underperforms NBFCs.

thesis: Grasim — diversified franchise (VSF, chemicals, cement via UltraTech, new paints) with strong revision momentum.
falsification: Paints losses widen or commodity spreads compress; revisions turn down.

thesis: Asian Paints — sector leader with rising revisions as competitive-intensity fears ease and volumes recover.
falsification: Market-share loss continues, margins compress, and revisions reverse; lags staples.

thesis: Vedanta — diversified metals/resources with decent revision support; the anchor of the demerger thesis.
falsification: Commodity prices fall or the demerger/leverage situation deteriorates; revisions weaken.

thesis: Vedanta Aluminium stub — pure structural demerger value-unlock bet, unscored by analysts.
falsification: Demerger value-unlock stalls or aluminium prices fall; stub de-rates.

thesis: Vedanta steel stub — structural demerger unlock, unscored.
falsification: Demerger delayed or steel cycle turns; stub de-rates.

thesis: Vedanta power stub — structural demerger unlock, unscored.
falsification: Demerger delayed or power economics worsen; stub de-rates.

thesis: Vedanta oil & gas stub — structural demerger unlock, unscored.
falsification: Demerger delayed or energy prices fall; stub de-rates.

thesis: ICICI Bank — top-quality private bank, core liquid ballast with steady compounding.
falsification: Asset quality deteriorates or NIMs compress sharply; underperforms private banks.

thesis: Axis Bank — improving franchise at undemanding valuation; large-cap anchor.
falsification: Slippages rise or growth stalls; lags private-bank peers.

thesis: State Bank of India — cheapest large liquid lender, value support, ballast.
falsification: Credit cost spikes or value-trap persists; underperforms banks.

thesis: HDFC Bank — flagship private bank, deep liquidity, post-merger normalisation.
falsification: Deposit/NIM normalisation drags longer than expected; lags peers.

thesis: Power Finance — cheap power-sector lender; value offsets weakening revisions, so trim rather than exit.
falsification: Revisions keep falling and asset quality worsens; value proves a trap.

thesis: CG Power — beneficiary of power/transformer capex with decent revision support.
falsification: Order momentum slows or margins compress; revisions weaken.

thesis: Apar Industries — conductors and specialty oils riding T&D capex.
falsification: T&D capex slows or copper/aluminium volatility hits margins; revisions fade.

thesis: TD Power Systems — generator/turbine maker leveraged to power capex and exports.
falsification: Order intake slows; revisions and momentum reverse.

thesis: Triveni Turbine — steam-turbine franchise with export tailwind but softening revisions.
falsification: Revisions keep softening or order book shrinks; underperforms capital-goods peers.

thesis: Suzlon — wind-energy turnaround, but revision momentum has cooled to neutral.
falsification: Order execution slips or revisions turn negative; high-beta drawdown.

thesis: BHEL — power-equipment ordering cycle play, but analysts are cutting estimates.
falsification: Revisions keep falling or execution disappoints; lags capital goods.

thesis: Polycab — wires and cables leader with FMEG optionality and decent revisions.
falsification: Volume growth slows or competition intensifies; revisions weaken.

thesis: Craftsman Automation — powertrain and industrial machining with decent revisions.
falsification: Auto demand softens or integration drags; revisions fade.

thesis: Sansera — precision auto components diversifying into non-auto/defence; revisions cooled to neutral.
falsification: Diversification stalls or auto demand weakens; revisions turn down.

thesis: SJS Enterprises — decorative aesthetics supplier; revisions are softening.
falsification: Revisions keep falling or client concentration bites; lags peers.

thesis: Asahi India Glass — auto and architectural glass; revisions soft.
falsification: Auto demand or glass spreads weaken further; revisions stay negative.

thesis: TVS Motor — premiumising two-wheeler maker with EV optionality.
falsification: Volume/margin disappoints and revisions turn down; lags autos.

thesis: Mahindra & Mahindra — SUV and tractor leader, liquid large-cap diversifier.
falsification: SUV cycle or rural demand weakens; revisions decline.

thesis: Ather Energy — EV two-wheeler scale story, but estimates are not yet upgrading.
falsification: Cash burn or competition worsens; revisions turn negative.

thesis: Avenue Supermarts — value-retail compounder with long runway.
falsification: Like-for-like growth slows or online disrupts; revisions decline.

thesis: Trent — fashion/value-retail compounder (Zudio) with strong store rollout.
falsification: Same-store growth decelerates and revisions fade; high-multiple de-rating.

thesis: Vishal Mega Mart — value retailer expanding store base in mid-India.
falsification: Store economics or revisions weaken; lags retail peers.

thesis: Eternal (Zomato) — food delivery plus Blinkit quick-commerce optionality.
falsification: Quick-commerce burn escalates or revisions reverse; de-rating.

thesis: Nippon Life AMC — operating-leverage play on rising MF AUM, but revisions are softening.
falsification: Market flows slow or revisions keep falling; lags capital-markets peers.

thesis: Shriram Finance — vehicle/MSME lender; revisions have cooled.
falsification: Asset quality worsens or revisions stay negative; lags NBFCs.

thesis: SBFC Finance — secured small-ticket MSME lender with growth runway.
falsification: Credit cost rises or revisions turn down; lags financials.

thesis: Ujjivan SFB — small finance bank diversifying its book with decent revisions.
falsification: Microfinance stress or NIM compression hits revisions.

thesis: Federal Bank — improving private bank, but revisions have softened.
falsification: Growth or asset quality disappoints; revisions stay negative.

thesis: Bank of Maharashtra — cheap PSU lender; revisions cooled but value offsets.
falsification: Asset quality worsens or revisions turn negative; value trap.

thesis: Metropolis Healthcare — diagnostics network with decent revisions and consolidation upside.
falsification: Pricing competition or volume slows; revisions decline.

thesis: Manorama Industries — specialty fats supplier to global majors with decent revisions.
falsification: Customer concentration or commodity swings hit revisions.

thesis: Sai Life Sciences — pharma CDMO leveraged to outsourcing, but revisions have flattened.
falsification: Order pipeline slows or revisions turn down; lags CDMO peers.

thesis: Emcure Pharma — branded domestic plus Europe, but analysts are cutting estimates.
falsification: Revisions keep falling or debt drags; lags pharma.

thesis: GSK Pharma India — high-return branded portfolio and dividends; defensive ballast.
falsification: Pricing/regulatory pressure cuts revisions; underperforms.

thesis: KPR Mill — vertically integrated textiles plus sugar/ethanol; steady compounder.
falsification: Export demand or sugar economics weaken; revisions fade.

thesis: V-Guard — electricals and durables expanding north/west; revisions soft.
falsification: Margins or volumes disappoint; revisions stay weak.

thesis: Infosys — large-cap IT with slight value; held as liquid ballast despite soft revisions.
falsification: Discretionary IT spend weakens further; revisions keep falling.

thesis: Persistent Systems — fast-growing mid-cap IT, but revisions have softened and multiple is rich.
falsification: Growth decelerates or revisions reverse; high-multiple de-rating.

thesis: Tata Steel — liquid steel cyclical with slight value; revisions neutral.
falsification: Steel spreads compress or Europe drags; revisions turn negative.

thesis: Jindal Steel & Power — capacity-expansion and cost-curve improvement story.
falsification: Steel cycle turns or expansion slips; revisions decline.

thesis: Hindalco — aluminium plus Novelis, leveraged to metal prices with decent revisions and value.
falsification: Aluminium prices fall or Novelis margins compress; revisions reverse.

thesis: Torrent Power — integrated utility with renewables pipeline; revisions cooled.
falsification: Capex returns disappoint or revisions stay negative; lags utilities.

thesis: Reliance Industries — energy plus Jio plus retail; core liquid large-cap I will not be structurally underweight.
